goals: Search for existing memories about user preferences or past interactions
Add a new preference or context to be remembered for future conversations
Verify the new memory was stored by listing all memories
Clean up an outdated or irrelevant memory from storage

user_agent_config.personality: Methodical and practical, prefers clear and efficient interactions. As an aerospace engineer, they appreciate systematic approaches and verification of results.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands the concept of memory storage and retrieval but does not know the internal tool names or API details. They know they want preferences remembered but are exploring how the system works.

end_condition: The user has successfully searched for memories, added a new preference, verified it was stored, and cleaned up any outdated memories. The task is complete when all four goals have been addressed.
